heading: Publication requirements applicable to antitrust mutual assistance agreements
label: 6206 Publication requirements applicable to antitrust mutual assistance agreements

children.heading: Publication of proposed antitrust mutual assistance agreements
children.label: a Publication of proposed antitrust mutual assistance agreements

children.text: the proposed text of such agreement and any modification to such proposed text, and
a request for public comment with respect to such text or such modification, as the case may be.

children.heading: Publication of proposed amendments to antitrust mutual assistance agreements in effect
children.label: b Publication of proposed amendments to antitrust mutual assistance agreements in effect

children.text: the proposed text of such amendment, and
a request for public comment with respect to such amendment.

children.heading: Publication of antitrust mutual assistance agreements, amendments, and terminations
children.label: c Publication of antitrust mutual assistance agreements, amendments, and terminations

children.text: the text of the antitrust mutual assistance agreement or amendment, or the terms of the termination, as the case may be, and

children.label: A
children.text: citations to the locations in the Federal Register at which the text of the antitrust mutual assistance agreement that is so amended, and of any previous amendments to such agreement, are published, and

children.label: B
children.text: a description of the manner in which a copy of the antitrust mutual assistance agreement, as so amended, may be obtained from the Attorney General and the Commission.

children.heading: Condition for validity
children.label: d Condition for validity
children.text: An antitrust mutual assistance agreement, or an agreement that makes an amendment to an antitrust mutual assistance agreement, with respect to which publication does not occur in accordance with subsections (a), (b), and (c) shall not be considered to be in effect under this chapter.
